title: Connected Fluid Pipe Windows
description: Makes create's windowed fluid pipes connect to the next one
body:
I couldnt find a resource pack already doing this, so I just did it myself (shockingly easy)
![3 fluid pipes with seamless windows transferring chocolate, honey, and lava ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4058d7e46a7d18acc75dfa87f3f734f95b378984.png)

Simply makes em long instead of one small window per pipe. i reckon it looks cleaner
